categories_schema.description: Lookup table storing the fixed set of MoMo transaction types

example_record.description: Money received from another MoMo user

all_seeded_records.description: Money received from another MoMo user
Money transfer to a phone number
Cash deposited into MoMo from a bank
Payment processed by a merchant or business
Bundle or data pack purchase from MoMo balance
Cash withdrawn from MoMo via an agent

field_types.category_id: integer — auto-generated by the database, never null
field_types.category_code: string  — short machine-readable code, always unique
field_types.description: string  — human-readable explanation, can be null

data.description: Money received from another MoMo user

api_response_example.note: Full dataset contains 8 seeded categories. description field is nullable.
